description: Letter in which the sender addresses a cantor, who has been sick, and whom the writer has not recently seen, and from whom he now requests some liturgical hymns (yotzrot) for Passover. "Letter in the handwriting of Hillel b. ʿEli to an unnamed cantor, expressing regret for a missed meeting and asking him to send the Yoṣrot for Passover so that he may copy them." (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב שבו השולח פונה לחזן שהיה חולה ואותו לא ראה לאחרונה, ומבקש ממנו לשלוח פיוטי יוצרות לפסח. בכתב ידו של הלל ב' עלי.
